skills.name: begin_session
skills.description: Initialize and lock the workspace authority for the session (MANDATORY FIRST CALL).

skills.name: write_file
skills.description: Authoritative audited file write. Enforces canonical intent schema, enterprise policies, and cryptographic plan verification.

skills.name: lint_plan
skills.description: Validate a plan structure and contents against Spectral ruleset without approval.

skills.name: save_plan
skills.description: Sign a lint-passing plan and save it as a Cosign-compatible Sigstore bundle.

skills.name: generate_remediation_proposals
skills.description: Generate remediation proposals from forensic, audit, or error evidence.

skills.name: list_proposals
skills.description: List all pending read-only proposals and their metadata.

skills.name: generate_maturity_report
skills.description: Generate a formal Level-5 maturity score report based on workspace evidence.

skills.name: verify_workspace_integrity
skills.description: Verify workspace audit log and artifact integrity.

skills.name: replay_execution
skills.description: Deterministic forensic replay of execution from audit log.

skills.name: generate_attestation_bundle
skills.description: Generate signed attestation bundle from workspace evidence.
